title: New market entry PRD using adjacent market data as unvalidated proxy

inputs.prompt: Write a PRD for entering the SMB market. The team has strong data on enterprise buyer behavior from 3 years of sales but no direct SMB research. The business case uses enterprise conversion rates, contract values, and churn figures as proxies for SMB projections, adjusted down by 40% based on intuition. No SMB interviews, pilots, or comparable benchmarks have been conducted.
